title: LISTING Extraction Results
author: Anonymous
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The file is in json format and contains a list of entities (which may be known or NIL) with the mentions that have been identified for them. The fields are as follows: 

  idx: Index of the entity
name: Name of the entity (None, if NIL-entity)
is_nil: Whether the entity is a NIL-entity
mentions: (list)
  page: Name of the page where the mention is found
  listing: Index of the listing where the mention is found
  item: Index of the item within the listing where the mention is found
  text: Mention text
